violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025
Used egg crates are being used to drain fried chicken. Discussed options with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and quaternary ammonia sanitizing solutions for the dish machine and 3-bay sink. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the speed rack. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC relocated items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
